results.rendered_html:
anivartin (3. a + nivartin)
1〉 adj. nicht fliehend, tapfern Widerstand leistend: saṃyugeṣvanivartinām  R. 4,15,3 . saṃgrāmeṣvanivartinaḥ 6,107,4 .
— 2〉 m. N. pr. eines Bhikṣu  LALIT. 298 .

results.rendered_html:
anivartin a.
1 Brave, not retreating; also an epithet of Viṣṇu and the Almighty God.
2 Not returning; yauvanamanivarti yātaṃ tu  K. P. 10.
